title: LS 100 Pocket Scales
features: ⭐High Precision Accuracy Measures from 0.01g to 100g, perfect for tiny valuables or precise ingredients.
⭐ Portable Pocket-Size Design Small, lightweight, and easy to take with you — essential for travel, office, or outdoor use.
⭐Multi-Function Weighing Suitable for kitchen ingredients, jewellery, gemstones, coins, supplements, herbs, hobbies, crafts & more.
⭐Clear Backlit Display Easy-to-read digital screen ensures correct readings day or night.
⭐Easy Operation Simple one-touch controls with Tare function to subtract container weight.
description: ✅ On Balance Lite Mini Scale 100g x 0.01g – Digital Pocket Scales Compact | Accurate | Multi-Purpose Achieve precise measurements anytime, anywhere with the On Balance Lite Mini Scale. Designed for portability and reliability, this digital pocket scale delivers accurate 0.01g precision up to 100g, making it ideal for everyday use at home, work, or on the go.
